steps.heading: Get Your Free Cash Offer
steps.content:
Getting started is simple. Call us on 0800 012 1009, fill in our online form, or drop us an email with your property details. We'll need basic information about your Greenwich property — the address, property type, number of bedrooms, and its general condition. Whether you own a Georgian townhouse in Greenwich Town, a Victorian terrace in Charlton, a family home in Eltham, or a modern apartment in the Royal Arsenal development in Woolwich, we buy all types of residential property across the Royal Borough of Greenwich.

Once we receive your details, our experienced valuation team begins work immediately. We analyse recent sold prices on your street and in your neighbourhood, current market conditions across the Royal Borough, and the unique features of your property. We cross-reference Land Registry transaction data, local estate agent listings, and our own comprehensive database of Greenwich property sales to ensure our valuation is thorough and accurate.

Within 24 hours — and often within just a few hours — we'll present you with a genuine, no-obligation cash offer. This isn't an indicative price that will be negotiated down later; it's a firm offer backed by funds we have available and ready to deploy. We'll explain precisely how we arrived at the figure, reference comparable sales near landmarks like Greenwich Park or the O2 Arena, and answer any questions you have. There's absolutely no pressure to accept, and you're free to compare our offer with estate agent valuations or any other options you're considering.

steps.heading: Property Assessment and Legal Preparation
steps.content:
Once you accept our offer, things move quickly. We'll arrange a convenient time to visit your property — fitting around your schedule, whether that's a weekday, evening, or weekend. Our assessor conducts a thorough but non-intrusive inspection, typically completed in a single visit of 30-45 minutes. Unlike traditional buyers who may request multiple viewings, bring friends and family, or demand invasive surveys that delay the process by weeks, our assessment is efficient and professional.

During the visit, we evaluate the property's structural condition, note any maintenance requirements, and confirm our valuation. Crucially, we buy properties in any condition — so whether your Greenwich home is a beautifully maintained house overlooking Blackheath or a property in Plumstead that needs complete modernisation, our offer won't change. We account for condition from the outset, meaning there are no unpleasant surprises or last-minute price reductions that derail the sale.

At the same time, we instruct our solicitors to commence the conveyancing process. All legal fees are covered by us — you don't need to find or pay for a solicitor. Our legal partners specialise in fast-track property transactions across South East London and the Royal Borough of Greenwich. They begin preparing title checks, searches, and all necessary documentation immediately. We also manage all administrative requirements, local authority searches (including specific Greenwich council enquiries), and coordination between parties, ensuring nothing is missed and the process stays on track for your chosen completion date.

steps.heading: Choose Your Completion Date
steps.content:
One of the most powerful advantages of selling to Sell My House Fast Greenwich is that you decide when the sale completes. Need to sell within 7 days due to an urgent relocation? We've done it for homeowners across the borough, from Woolwich to Eltham. Prefer to wait a few weeks while you organise your next move, perhaps to another part of South East London or elsewhere in the UK? That's perfectly fine too. We've accommodated timelines ranging from 5 working days to several months, always working to whatever schedule suits the seller best.

This flexibility exists because we're genuine cash buyers with funds readily available. There's no mortgage approval to wait for, no property to sell first, and no chain of other transactions that need to complete before yours can. Once the legal paperwork is in order, we can exchange contracts and complete on any date you choose. Your dedicated case manager coordinates the timeline, liaising with solicitors and keeping everything moving towards your target date.

Throughout this period, you'll receive regular, proactive updates. Your case manager will inform you of the progress of legal searches, the status of documentation, and confirmation that everything is on course for your chosen completion date. If anything requires your input — a form to sign, a question to clarify — we make it as convenient as possible, with options for electronic signatures and phone consultations. Many of our Greenwich clients are genuinely surprised by how smooth and stress-free the experience is compared to anything they've encountered in the traditional property market.

steps.heading: Receive Your Cash Payment
steps.content:
On your chosen completion date, the agreed cash amount is transferred directly to your solicitor's client account, and from there to your nominated bank account. There are no last-minute deductions, no surprise fees, and no renegotiation. The amount we offered is exactly the amount you receive — guaranteed. For Greenwich homeowners who've experienced the anxiety of traditional sales where prices are chipped away at the eleventh hour, this certainty is profoundly reassuring.

Once the funds have been transferred and legal ownership passes to us, you're free to move forward with whatever comes next. Whether you're relocating from Greenwich to the countryside, downsizing from a family home in Eltham, moving into a new-build apartment in Woolwich, or simply releasing capital that's been locked in bricks and mortar, completion day marks the start of your next chapter — on your terms and your timeline.

Our commitment to you doesn't end at completion. If you need a few extra days to move your belongings after the sale completes, we can often accommodate that. If post-completion questions arise about any aspect of the transaction, our team remains available and responsive. We've helped previous clients with recommendations for removal firms, storage facilities, and other practical services across the Royal Borough of Greenwich. From the moment you first contact us to well after the sale is finalised, our aim is to deliver an experience that is fair, efficient, and genuinely supportive — every step of the way.
